headline: ₹0-10 Cr at risk — Singularity AMC's backing of Lohia Aerospace signals minor ESG narrative shift, limited direct financial impact
what_matters: BRSR, GRI, ESRS frameworks flagged; no imminent regulatory deadlines or penalties.
Tier 2 effect via Lohia Aerospace supply chain; indirect only.
No immediate P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is negligible.
